_comment: Schema reference for an Agent Feed Inbox report. This is a documentation/example file (not a JSON Schema validator) describing the shape the inbox adapter expects. Each report is one agent-report Mission Packet. Field meanings + allowed enums match lab/mission-control/feed/PACKET_MODEL.md. Required: id, agent, task, status. Everything else is recommended for a useful report. NEVER claim a status you have not verified — use 'reported'/'unknown' honestly.

fields.agent: string — agent name, e.g. 'Review Agent' | 'Security Agent' | 'UI/UX Agent' | 'Mobile QA Agent' | 'Release Agent' | 'Branch Hygiene Agent' | 'Dependency Agent' | 'PR Watcher Agent' | 'Deploy Watcher Agent'
fields.task: string — what the agent was asked to do
fields.status: open | in-progress | blocked | resolved | watching | unknown
fields.evidence: string[] — concrete proof: files changed, commands run, screenshots, routes checked
fields.lastUpdate: ISO date (YYYY-MM-DD) or 'reported' — the page computes freshness from real dates
fields.ownerAction: boolean — true if the owner must act now
fields.ownerActionText: string — the exact owner action (when ownerAction is true)
fields.nextAction: string — the next recommended action the agent suggests
fields.rawStatus: live | partial | placeholder | not wired — be honest; a hand-written report is at most 'manual'/'partial', never 'live'
